findings.evidence: Method `orderWithUnnecessaryDetails` has 6 parameters: pizzaType, size, crustType, toppings, extraCheese, discountCode.
Method `longComplaintMethod` has 9 lines of code and handles multiple unrelated complaints.
The `complain` method is called multiple times with the same arguments in `duplicateComplaint` (lines 77-79).
Method `orderPizza` calls `this.Shop.receiveOrder` which uses the `Shop` class's data.
Method `complain` accesses `this.Shop.casher.chef.cleanKitchen()` which is an internal detail of the `Shop` class.
Method `accessInternalDetails` accesses `this.Shop.casher.chef.busy` which is an internal detail of the `Shop` class.
Updating contact information requires changes in multiple methods (lines 110-115).
Method `notifyForPromotion` is changed for different reasons.
Method `notifyForDiscount` is changed for different reasons.
Method `notifyForNewArrivals` is changed for different reasons.
Method `applyDiscount` is part of a parallel inheritance hierarchy.
Method `applyLoyaltyPoints` is part of a parallel inheritance hierarchy.
Method `handleComplaint` uses an `if-else if` chain to handle different complaints.
Method `refusedBequest` is empty and does not use inherited methods.
Method `orderDrink` contains comments explaining what each line does.
Using `boolean` for `frequentCustomerDiscount` instead of a dedicated object.
Fields `tempDiscountCode` and `tempOrderNote` are only meaningful in some object states.
Class `Drink` is instantiated but not used.
